headline.line1: AI changes how you think, decide, and trust.

brandHero.subtitle: BufferLine makes those shifts visible.
brandHero.description: BufferLine builds the Cognitive OS for understanding how judgment moves, delegates, and becomes governable in human-AI systems.

system.title: Three tools, one purpose
system.description: Three independent domains in one Cognitive OS.
system.coreRuleDescription: Each domain works on its own. Together, they form a complete picture.

jdvp.title: JDVP
jdvp.subtitle: Observation
jdvp.description: Tracks where your judgment goes during AI conversations — are you deciding, or is the AI? No scores, no rankings. Just observation.

thinkprint.title: Thinkprint
thinkprint.subtitle: Reasoning extraction
thinkprint.description: Makes your reasoning patterns visible. Not what you know, but how you think — captured and shareable.

metagovernance.title: Meta Governance
metagovernance.subtitle: Authority design
metagovernance.description: Explores how decision-making authority forms and moves between people and AI agents.
